Angle 1 · No White Cast Test 8 cuts · 28 sec
✅ Must-Do Checklist
🎣 Hook in first 3 sec: Product close-up + "Korean sunscreen theory" subtitle — grab attention immediately
😱 Exaggerate the amount: Use visibly MORE than normal. The point is the dramatic before vs. after absorption
⏱️ Keep it 15-30 sec: Fast pacing, no long pauses. Each cut = 2-4 sec max
💡 Good lighting required: Natural light or ring light — the no-white-cast result must be clearly visible on camera
🚫 Avoid: "최고", "최초", "최상" — no superlative claims. Show, don't tell
#️⃣ Include in caption: #TroublessGlassGlow #NoWhiteCast #KoreanSunscreen #SPF50
